reference: For the past six weeks, I have been feeling a burning sensation at the end of my right shoulder near my spine, and the skin feels numb to the touch and itchy. I keep stretching it out, but it does not help. I am a builder, and I have started bodybuilding over the past seven months. I am used to experiencing pain between my shoulder blades from excessive work and repetitive movements, but this is a different pain. I feel it more when I am rested.
text: For the past six months, I have been feeling the burning sensation at the end of my right shoulder and my left thigh, and the skin is hurting me to the touch and itch. I keep stepping it out, but it does not help. I am a go-go, and I am dying to see the body getting into the past seven months. I am used to experiencing pain between my shaded legs from excessive work and repetitive movements, but this is a different pain. I feel it more when I am rested.
